empty.noArchives: No archives found in the downloads folder
empty.noPath: Set a downloads path in Configuration first

deleteDialog.title: Delete Download
deleteDialog.description: You are about to permanently delete {name} from your downloads path.

deleteAllDialog.title: Delete All Downloads
deleteAllDialog.description: This permanently deletes every archive currently listed in your downloads folder. Files already installed as mods will not be affected.

toast.setPathsFirst: Set Game Path and Mod Library before installing mods
toast.fileNotAvailable: Download file is not available yet

welcome.headline: Let's set up your workspace
welcome.subtitle: A quick, one-time setup. Point Hyperion to Cyberpunk 2077 and choose where your mods live — it takes less than a minute.

game.label: Game
game.heading: Where is Cyberpunk 2077 installed?
game.description: Point Hyperion to your game folder. We use it to verify the install and deploy your mods safely.

library.label: Mod library
library.heading: Where should your mods live?
library.description: Every mod you add is kept here — organized, staged, and ready to enable whenever you want.
library.preview: Where your managed mods are stored

downloads.label: Downloads
downloads.heading: Where do new downloads land?
downloads.description: Hyperion picks up new mod archives from this folder. We've suggested one next to your library — change it anytime.
downloads.preview: Where new mod archives are picked up

nexus.label: Nexus
nexus.heading: Connect your Nexus account
nexus.description: Paste your personal Nexus Mods API key to enable downloads and update checks. You can skip this and add it later in Settings > Nexus.

game.placeholder: No folder selected — detect or browse below
game.valid: Cyberpunk 2077 found — you're good to go.
game.invalid: We couldn't find Cyberpunk 2077 in this folder.
game.continueTooltip: Select a valid Cyberpunk 2077 folder to continue

library.placeholder: No folder selected — use the suggestion or browse
library.valid: This folder is ready to use.
library.invalid: This folder can't be used as a mod library.
library.continueTooltip: Select a valid mod library folder to continue

downloads.info: New mod downloads will be saved here.

nexus.instruction1: Log in to Nexus Mods and open the API Key Settings page.
nexus.instruction2: Scroll to the bottom and find Personal API Key.
nexus.instruction3: Copy your personal API key and paste it below.
nexus.apiKeyPlaceholder: Paste your Nexus Mods API key
nexus.optionalInfo: Optional — you can add this later in Settings > Nexus.
nexus.error: We couldn't validate this key. Double-check you copied the Personal API Key.

welcome.finishTooltip: Select a valid game folder and mod library to finish

toast.finishInvalid: Select a valid game folder and mod library before finishing
toast.purged: Purged {count} active mod(s) from the previous deployment
toast.purgeFailed: Could not fully purge {count} mod(s) from the previous deployment
toast.restorePartial: Loaded library, but {count} active mod(s) could not be restored

installBehavior.title: Install Behavior
installBehavior.description: Default behavior for archives that finish downloading through Nexus links.
installBehavior.toggleDescription: Nexus downloads install automatically when the archive is ready. Disable this if you prefer staging files in Downloads first.

runtimeCaptures.title: Runtime Captures
runtimeCaptures.description: Files written by mod tools (CET, RED4ext plugins) during gameplay are captured here and kept out of the game folder between sessions.
runtimeCaptures.clean: No captured files - game folder is clean.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language Hyperion's interface is displayed in.
